primary.usage: Primary actions, active navigation, selected states, and task focus.

border.usage: Borders, dividers, table rules, and panel edges.

warning.usage: Warnings, blockers, and job risk indicators.

headline.purpose: Route titles and major workspace context.

body.purpose: Default text, row descriptions, form help, and workflow copy.

label.purpose: Metadata, badges, command rows, field labels, and compact controls.

hairlineLift.usage: App shell panels, row lists, and persistent containers.

motion.principle: Motion conveys state, feedback, loading, and reveal. It should not delay product work.

rules: Earn Linear-level trust with coherent, familiar product components.
Design one workspace for office desktop use and mobile site use.
Make active organization, role, job, site, and permission context explicit.
Use AI as workflow infrastructure, not as a decorative theme.
Do not simplify the UI into a basic field app.
